markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on AEO strategies and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**growthx.ai's Model:** An agency using AI-driven "content machines" (e.g., for Webflow) to produce high-volume content (30–40 articles/week), targeting direct signups and indirect brand mentions in LLM answers.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [**Faire's AEO Focus:** Prioritizing retailer acquisition, Faire's AEO experiments leverage existing SEO success from long-tail product pages and are now testing new, hyper-specific content to capture more LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**AEO's Cross-Functional Nature:** AEO requires collaboration across SEO, PR, and PMM. Jason noted SEO teams are often tasked with this but lack the necessary cross-functional skills, a challenge Zack is actively addressing at Faire.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Vendor Landscape:** Both use Scrunch for AEO monitoring. Jason highlighted that Profound, while a strong marketer, primarily measures outcomes created by agencies like growthx.ai, not the creation work itself.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's AEO Strategy

  - [**Model:** A "technology agency" that builds and operates AI-driven "content machines" for clients, focusing on outcomes over just providing a platform.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [**Automation:** Workflows combine AI agents (research, writing) and human experts (e.g., a full-stack engineer for Webflow's dev docs).](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [**Volume:** Produces 30–40 articles/week for clients like Webflow and Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Maintenance:** The "machines" also update content to keep pace with rapid product changes (e.g., Webflow's quarterly rebrands).](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Measurement:**](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [**North Star:** Bottom-of-funnel metrics (e.g., signups).](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Leading Indicators:** SEO metrics (rank, impressions, clicks) and AEO mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**AEO Goal:** Win indirect brand mentions in LLM answers, as direct links are rare.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Research:** Map target prompts and analyze citation sources (Reddit, public forums).](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Reddit Strategy:** Ranges from standard commenting to "gray hat" methods like seeding and steering discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Vendor Directory Example:** growthx.ai created the content for Ramp's vendor and expense category directories, which Profound now uses for its marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

### Faire's AEO Initiatives

  - [**Context:** Faire is dedicating Q4 to AEO experiments, building on significant organic growth from ChatGPT without prior specific effort.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Retailer acquisition and signups.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [**Informational:** Establish authority on wholesale/retail topics.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Transactional:** Capture long-tail product searches (e.g., "wholesale Halloween candles").](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Key Finding:** Hyper-specific, long-tail pages (e.g., collections) perform best in both SEO and AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Experimentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**On-site:** Create new, hyper-specific pages to test citation and signup rates.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Off-site:** Influence citations on other sites via affiliate and community teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [**PDPs:** Test optimizing Product Detail Pages (PDPs) for AEO, a challenge as brands control the content.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### AEO's Cross-Functional Challenge

  - [**Problem:** AEO is often owned by SEO teams but requires a broader skillset (PR, community, PMM) and cross-functional coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Faire's Approach:** Zack is actively promoting a cross-functional model, which the company has embraced.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [**Measurement Challenge:** Balancing direct signups (for transactional content) with indirect awareness (for informational content).](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Send Zack an invite to growthx.ai's free AI content workshops.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [**Zack:** Review the workshop invitation and consider attending.](https://fathom.video/share/wo97diLuxuPx-HMkzVWyPstg_pWEPLkM?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
